title: `podman-clean-transient.service` is missing for rootless
body:
### Discussed in https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/22316
Originally posted by **MartinX3** April 9, 2024 I saw that the `podman-clean-transient.service` only exists in the `system` folder but not in the `user` folder. Doesn't it work in the rootless mode or was it just forgotten? See PR: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/16892 `transient_store` is true by default.
